title: App Icon Badge Count for My Work
excerpt: I use My Work on the iPhone app to filter tasks for Today that I need to address; however, I am requesting that the option be added to use the app icon badge to display the count of tasks in the My Work area under ‘Today…

posts.author: ekalb79 (Blake)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use My Work on the iPhone app to filter tasks for Today that I need to address; however, I am requesting that the option be added to use the app icon badge to display the count of tasks in the My Work area under ‘Today’.
This would allow visibility on the outstanding tasks for the day at a glance from our homescreen. This feature is already widely in use among other task management apps such as Todoist, Things, etc.
Thanks.
